modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issue with connecting floor plans to TMA from new location.

full_description_text:  
Field technician is unable to connect floor plans to TMA.  
This issue arises from the new location on FM SharePoint.  
The connection problem occurs specifically when using an iPad.  
Further investigation is needed to resolve this matter.
short_description: Issue with connecting floor plans to TMA from new location.
description:
